maintainer: Arun Tiwari — Crane Supervisor / Hydraulic Systems Specialist

entries.title: Rexroth A4VG Series 40 — Variable Displacement Axial Piston Pump
entries.desc: Closed-loop pump reference: charge pressure specs, servo control, variable displacement diagnostics, fault isolation for A4VG028–180 variants.

entries.title: Rexroth A2FO / A7VO — Fixed & Variable Displacement Open Circuit Pumps
entries.desc: Open-circuit pump selection guide, pressure/flow sizing, shaft options, port identifications, commissioning procedure and case drain limits.

entries.title: Danfoss Series 90 — Closed-Loop Pump Full Reference
entries.desc: S90 pump/motor integration: charge circuit, servo pressure, EDC/HDC control, brake valve settings and fault diagnostic flow charts.

entries.title: Favelle Favco Field Case — Rig Al-Hail ADNOC Drilling Jan 2026
entries.desc: Offshore field case: main hoist HPU low charge pressure fault, root cause analysis, corrective actions and preventive maintenance recommendations.

entries.title: Rexroth A10VO / A10VSO — Variable Displacement Open Circuit Pump
entries.desc: DR/DRG/EP control types, case drain limits (1 bar abs max), EP signal 350–1000 mA, filtration requirements, fault table and cross-reference to equivalent pumps.

entries.title: Danfoss Series 90 — Closed-Circuit Axial Piston Pump/Motor (75cc Frame)
entries.desc: EDC neutral 12 mA reference, charge pressure thresholds (min 17 bar), case drain rebuild limits per frame size, loop flushing valve fault guide.

entries.title: SeaTrax Marine Hydraulic Crane — Model 4228
entries.desc: Open-circuit LS system, pilot pressure 400–600 psi critical range, CBV luffing circuit settings, LMI fault guide and maintenance intervals.

entries.title: NOV AHC Knuckle Boom Crane — T6047-Z-MA-001
entries.desc: Active heave compensation system, servo valve response requirements, accumulator N₂ pre-charge data, ISO 16/14/11 cleanliness mandate, AHC heat load guide.
